# kCGImagePropertyCIFFLensModel

**Global Variable**

The lens model.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyCIFFLensModel: CFString
```

## Lens and Focus

- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFFocusMode**: The focus mode.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFLensMaxMM**: The maximum lens length in millimeters.
- **kCGImagePropertyCIFFLensMinMM**: The minimum lens length in millimeters.

items.description: The maximum lens length in millimeters.
items.name: kCGImagePropertyCIFFLensMaxMM

items.description: The minimum lens length in millimeters.
